title: ITALY enforcement action against Enel Energia S.p.A. (563,052)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 563,052 on Enel Energia S.p.A. The controller had been active in direct marketing activities and failed to implement a system that would allow them to ensure there was a sufficient legal basis for contacting data subjects.
